dialogue.text: What kind of system do you want?
an appointment booking system for a clinic
What should users be able to do?
book appointments, cancel them, and see schedules
Do users need login or authentication?
patients and staff should sign in
booking should happen fast, maybe under 3 seconds

functional: The system shall allow patients and staff to sign in.
The system shall allow patients to book appointments.
The system shall allow patients to cancel appointments.
The system shall allow staff and doctors to view appointment schedules.
non_functional: The system shall complete booking operations within 3 seconds.
The system shall protect the privacy of patient data.
